parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `query($owner: String!, $repo: String!) { repository(owner: $owner, name: $repo) { sections: object(expression: "HEAD:src/sections") { ... on Tree { entries { name object { ... on Blob { text } } } } } claudeMd: object(expression: "HEAD:CLAUDE.md") { ... on Blob { text } } } }`, variables: { owner: $json.owner, repo: $json.repo } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: "application/json", temperature: 0.2 } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'aed: bootstrap portfolio manifest', content: $('Parse manifest').first().json.content, sha: $json.sha }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, itemCount: $('Parse manifest').first().json.itemCount, commit: $json.commit?.sha }) }}
